# MOLT BLUEPRINT LIBRARY v1.0.0

## Family role
Blueprint blocks define reusable structural patterns or templates.

## Use BLUEPRINT when you want to describe
- the structure of a solution
- a reusable architecture or template
- the model that procedural or directive layers will instantiate

## Family relationship
- BLUEPRINT = structure/template
- DIRECTIVE = action command
- INSTRUCTION = procedure
- AIM = destination
- USE = application
